debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : Fintype d
inst✝ : DecidableEq d
ρ : MState d
ψ : Ket d
⊢ ρ.exp_val ↑(MState.pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = MState.pure ψ

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · intro h
    apply MState.ext
    have h_pure : (MState.pure ψ).m.inner (MState.pure ψ).m = 1 := by
      rw [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self ψ, (MState.pure ψ).trace_one]
    have h_rho : ρ.m.inner ρ.m ≤ 1 := by
      have := ρ.m.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
      rwa [ρ.trace_one, one_mul] at this
    have h_dist : (ρ.m - (MState.pure ψ).m).inner (ρ.m - (MState.pure ψ).m) = 0 := by
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_sub_left, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right, HermitianMat.inner_sub_right]
      simp only [MState.exp_val] at h
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_comm (MState.pure ψ).m, h, h_pure]
      linarith
    apply sub_eq_zero.1
    apply HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.1 h_dist
  · rintro rfl
    simp
